mysite
Table of Contents

Class ReservaService

Namespace
BLL.Services
Assembly
BLL.dll

Business logic service for reservation management.

public class ReservaService
Inheritance
object
ReservaService
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Handles availability computation, reservation creation (with race-condition guard), cancellation with automatic refunds, and receipt generation (non-fatal). All multi-step write operations run inside IUnitOfWork transactions.

Constructors

ReservaService()

Initializes all dependencies from DalFactory singletons.

public ReservaService()

Methods

CancelarReserva(Guid)

Cancels a reservation: marks it Cancelada, inserts a reversal movement, and transitions all Abonado payments to Reembolsado with corresponding negative movements.

public void CancelarReserva(Guid reservaId)

Parameters

reservaId Guid

The reservation to cancel.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the reservation does not exist, is already cancelled, or is finalized.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown if the reservation is already cancelled or finalized.

GenerarReserva(GenerarReservaDTO)

Creates a reservation with a down payment, guarding against race conditions via a double-checked availability lock inside the transaction.

public string GenerarReserva(GenerarReservaDTO dto)

Parameters

dto GenerarReservaDTO

Reservation parameters including optional advance payment amount.

Returns

string

The generated reservation code (e.g., "RES-123456-ABCD").

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown for invalid inputs: negative advance, zero duration, past date, advance exceeding total, or advance below the 10% minimum.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the space is no longer available at transaction time (race condition).

ArgumentException

Thrown for invalid amount, duration, or past date.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown if the space is unavailable or the advance exceeds the total.

ListarReservas(Guid?, Guid?, DateTime?)

Returns reservations filtered by any combination of client, space, and minimum date. All returned DTOs have ClienteNombre and EspacioNombre hydrated.

public List<ReservaDTO> ListarReservas(Guid? clienteId, Guid? espacioId, DateTime? desde)

Parameters

clienteId Guid?

Optional client filter.

espacioId Guid?

Optional space filter.

desde DateTime?

Optional minimum FechaHora filter.

Returns

List<ReservaDTO>

ObtenerHorariosDisponibles(Guid, DateTime)

Returns all free 30-minute time slots for a space on a given date based on the space's agenda.

public List<TimeSpan> ObtenerHorariosDisponibles(Guid espacioId, DateTime fecha)

Parameters

espacioId Guid

The space to query.

fecha DateTime

The date to check (time component is ignored).

Returns

List<TimeSpan>

List of available start times as TimeSpan values.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown with code "ERR_NO_AGENDA" if no agenda is configured for this space.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown with code "ERR_NO_AGENDA" if the space has no configured schedule.

ObtenerPorCodigo(string)

Retrieves a reservation by its unique code, with ClienteNombre and EspacioNombre hydrated.

public ReservaDTO ObtenerPorCodigo(string codigo)

Parameters

codigo string

The reservation code.

Returns

ReservaDTO

The hydrated ReservaDTO, or null if not found.

VerificarDisponibilidad(Guid, DateTime, int)

Checks whether a space is available for the requested time slot (delegates to repository).

public bool VerificarDisponibilidad(Guid espacioId, DateTime fechaHora, int duracion)

Parameters

espacioId Guid

The space to check.

fechaHora DateTime

Proposed start date and time.

duracion int

Duration in minutes.

Returns

bool

true if no conflicting active reservation exists.
